summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

sentiment.positive: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます
sentiment.negative: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます
sentiment.neutral: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

raw_articles.title: Anthropic’s landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved
raw_articles.summary: The final approval settles one case, but it doesn't resolve the broader issue of using copyrighted works to train AI models.

raw_articles.title: Trump’s latest AI czar has already resigned
raw_articles.summary: The director role for the Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) has become a revolving door since David Sacks left his position as czar.

raw_articles.title: Jim Cramer says it's time to look beyond tech as AI uncertainty rattles the market
raw_articles.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer says the AI trade has become too unpredictable, making this a better time to put new money into high-quality companies outside of technology.

raw_articles.title: Here are the 30,000 songs Sony is suing Udio’s AI music generator over
raw_articles.summary: Sony Music Entertainment has filed another lawsuit against Udio, accusing the AI music generator of infringing the copyright of more than 30,000 of its songs, ranging from Elvis Presley's Hound Dog to Beyoncé's Say My Name, and Harry Styles' As It Was. The lawsuit, filed in a New York court on Monday, claims that this […]

raw_articles.title: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make Gemini more efficient
raw_articles.summary: Alphabet, Google's parent company, is reportedly working on a new chip designed to make its Gemini models run much more efficiently.

raw_articles.title: Writer's AI harness cuts token spend nearly 40% — without sacrificing accuracy
raw_articles.summary: Enterprise AI is facing an ROI paradox. While throwing more compute at the strongest foundation model works well in product experiments, the costs become unbearable when the product is deployed in production.A new paper from researchers at Writer provides a solution that is accessible to engineering teams. The study takes a systematic look at optimizing the different components of the orchestration layer that wraps around the foundation model, aka the AI harness. By optimizing the harness, the r

raw_articles.title: SpaceX in your index fund, explained
raw_articles.summary: Index funds are touted as one of the safest ways to invest. Rather than picking and choosing individual stocks, index funds let you bet on the market as a whole. So what happens when a company like SpaceX - a giant gamble, and, in my opinion, terribly overpriced - is fast-tracked into the Nasdaq-100? Does […]

raw_articles.title: The Galaxy Card Is Samsung’s Answer to the Apple Card
raw_articles.summary: Directly added to your Samsung Wallet account, it’s yet another cash-back credit card, this time tailored for Samsung stans.

raw_articles.title: AI’s most important protocol is getting a little bit easier to use
raw_articles.summary: Under the new system, the protocol will take a looser, "stateless" approach to session IDs on the server side, similar to how most ordinary websites already work.

raw_articles.title: Alphabet stock pops on report it's developing a more efficient AI chip
raw_articles.summary: The new AI chip, called "Frozen v2," would embed parts of Gemini's architecture directly into the silicon, according to the report.

raw_articles.title: Trump administration's head of AI safety agency resigns after 3 months on job
raw_articles.summary: Arvind Raman, the director of National Institute of Standards and Technology, will serve as acting director of CAISI, according to a spokesperson

raw_articles.title: Archer stock rips 20% higher as company unveils military craft with Anduril
raw_articles.summary: Archer and its eVTOL peers are racing for FAA certification to start flying their air taxis commercially.

raw_articles.title: X relaunches a rebuilt Android app after year-long effort
raw_articles.summary: X says the rebuilt version of its Android app is now available globally.

raw_articles.title: Startup Launches Foundry to Develop Materials for Chips
raw_articles.summary: Founding members -- including Nvidia, Meta and Samsung -- aim to reduce their reliance on rare materials used in chips.

raw_articles.title: Even Mild Sleep Deprivation May Lead to Weight Gain
raw_articles.summary: A recent study suggests that not getting enough sleep increases the risk of weight gain, and thus of conditions like heart disease and type 2 diabetes.
